title: Subject-matter accuracy + sensitivity review of HSE items (sign-off recorded)
context: HSE items do not ship without a subject-matter accuracy reviewer's recorded sign-off. This task is the independent subject-matter accuracy and sensitivity review of the drafted HSE items. Subject accuracy reviewer is TO BE SECURED (verifiedNeed=false).
objective: Run and record the subject-matter accuracy and sensitivity review of the HSE items with a version-scoped sign-off.
acceptanceCriteria: Independent subject-matter accuracy review finds 0 factual errors (any found -> block + root-cause); 0 items flagged as insensitive
Version-scoped sign-off recorded in the reviewers ledger before ship
Non-affiliation and non-official/non-advice labeling confirmed on all reviewed items
